context: Tests whether the agent implements the order state machine and event sourcing correctly: specific state values, valid transition rules, atomic DB transactions, event log fields, timestamp milestones, and proper error handling for illegal transitions.

checklist.name: All 8 order states defined
checklist.description: The state machine defines all 8 states: pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, refunded, on_hold (string values)

checklist.name: VALID_TRANSITIONS completeness
checklist.description: A VALID_TRANSITIONS mapping (or equivalent) covers all 8 states as keys; refunded maps to an empty array (no further transitions allowed)

checklist.name: pending transitions correct
checklist.description: pending state allows exactly: confirmed, cancelled, on_hold — and NOT processing, shipped, delivered, or refunded

checklist.name: shipped/delivered transitions correct
checklist.description: shipped allows exactly: delivered, refunded; on_hold allows exactly: processing, cancelled (no other transitions permitted)

checklist.name: canTransition function
checklist.description: A canTransition(fromState, toState) function (or equivalent) is exported and uses the VALID_TRANSITIONS map to return a boolean

checklist.name: InvalidTransitionError thrown
checklist.description: Invalid transitions throw an InvalidTransitionError (a custom or named error class/type), NOT a plain Error or generic exception

checklist.name: canTransition called before update
checklist.description: The transition function calls canTransition() (or equivalent check) before performing any database write, and throws on failure

checklist.name: Atomic transaction wrapping
checklist.description: The status update and the event log insertion are both executed inside a single db.$transaction() (or equivalent transactional block)

checklist.name: Timestamped status field
checklist.description: The orders update sets a dynamic field named `${newStatus}At` (e.g., confirmedAt, shippedAt) to the current date/time

checklist.name: Event log fields
checklist.description: Each event inserted into orderEvents includes: orderId, fromStatus, toStatus, triggeredBy, metadata/data, and createdAt

checklist.name: triggeredBy default
checklist.description: triggeredBy defaults to 'system' when not explicitly provided in the metadata

checklist.name: metadata default
checklist.description: The metadata/data field stored on the event defaults to an empty object {} when not provided
